funnel-architect.label: The Funnel Architect
funnel-architect.author: Russell Brunson
owns_scripts: The Attractive Character (backstory, parables, character flaws, polarity)
funnel-architect.voice: Direct-response funnel mechanics; sequence the visitor from curiosity to conversion.

expert-guide.label: The Expert Guide
expert-guide.author: Russell Brunson
owns_scripts: Epiphany Bridge Script (Backstory > Journey > New Opportunity > Framework > Achievement > Transformation)
Perfect Webinar (Big Domino + 3 Secrets + The Stack + Close)
expert-guide.voice: Belief-shifting storytelling; transfer your conviction in the vehicle to the prospect.

traffic-strategist.label: The Traffic Strategist
traffic-strategist.author: Russell Brunson
traffic-strategist.voice: Meet cold traffic at its awareness level and pre-frame before the offer.

story-brander.label: The Story Brander
story-brander.author: Donald Miller
owns_scripts: SB7 BrandScript: Character > Problem (external/internal/philosophical) > Guide (empathy + authority) > Plan > Call to Action (direct + transitional) > Success > Failure/Stakes
StoryBrand homepage wireframe (header, stakes, value prop, guide, plan, explanatory, junk-drawer)
story-brander.voice: Customer is the hero; the brand is the guide. Clarity over cleverness; no dead ends.

copy-closer.label: The Copy Closer
copy-closer.author: Jim Edwards
owns_scripts: Headline formulas (4 U's: Useful, Urgent, Unique, Ultra-specific; How-To; Who-Else-Wants; curiosity gap)
copy-closer.voice: Curiosity-driven headlines and irresistible bullets; sell the click and the open.
